items.front: When are Special VFR operations authorized?
items.back: When weather conditions are below basic VFR minimums within Class B, C, D, or E surface areas.

items.front: What separation is required for SVFR departures?
items.back: Separation from other SVFR and IFR aircraft.

items.front: What separation is required for SVFR arrivals?
items.back: Separation from other SVFR and IFR arrivals.
